jobs_positive_amount_chk.name: jobs_positive_amount_chk
jobs_positive_amount_chk.value: "jobs"."amount_baht" > 0 and "jobs"."platform_fee_bps" between 0 and 10000 and "jobs"."platform_fee_baht" >= 0 and "jobs"."worker_net_baht" >= 0 and "jobs"."platform_fee_baht" + "jobs"."worker_net_baht" = "jobs"."amount_baht"

money_policy_limits_chk.name: money_policy_limits_chk
money_policy_limits_chk.value: "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_top_up_baht" > 0 and "money_policy_revisions"."maximum_top_up_baht" >= "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_top_up_baht" and "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_funded_job_baht" > 0 and "money_policy_revisions"."maximum_funded_job_baht" >= "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_funded_job_baht" and "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_earnings_conversion_baht" > 0 and "money_policy_revisions"."maximum_earnings_conversion_baht" >= "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_earnings_conversion_baht" and "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_payout_baht" > 0 and "money_policy_revisions"."maximum_payout_baht" >= "money_policy_revisions"."minimum_payout_baht"

payout_quotes_amount_chk.name: payout_quotes_amount_chk
payout_quotes_amount_chk.value: "payout_quotes"."receipt_baht" > 0 and "payout_quotes"."maximum_fee_baht" >= 0 and "payout_quotes"."maximum_tax_baht" >= 0 and "payout_quotes"."maximum_debit_baht" = "payout_quotes"."receipt_baht" + "payout_quotes"."maximum_fee_baht" + "payout_quotes"."maximum_tax_baht" and "payout_quotes"."quoted_fee_satang" >= 0 and "payout_quotes"."quoted_tax_satang" >= 0 and "payout_quotes"."quoted_debit_satang" > 0

top_up_quotes_amounts_chk.name: top_up_quotes_amounts_chk
top_up_quotes_amounts_chk.value: "top_up_quotes"."credit_baht" > 0 and "top_up_quotes"."charged_fee_baht" >= 0 and "top_up_quotes"."charged_tax_baht" >= 0 and "top_up_quotes"."payment_total_baht" = "top_up_quotes"."credit_baht" + "top_up_quotes"."charged_fee_baht" + "top_up_quotes"."charged_tax_baht" and "top_up_quotes"."provider_fee_satang" >= 0 and "top_up_quotes"."provider_tax_satang" >= 0 and "top_up_quotes"."provider_total_satang" > 0

top_ups_amount_chk.name: top_ups_amount_chk
top_ups_amount_chk.value: "top_ups"."credit_baht" > 0 and "top_ups"."charged_fee_baht" >= 0 and "top_ups"."charged_tax_baht" >= 0 and "top_ups"."payment_total_baht" = "top_ups"."credit_baht" + "top_ups"."charged_fee_baht" + "top_ups"."charged_tax_baht" and "top_ups"."provider_fee_satang" >= 0 and "top_ups"."provider_tax_satang" >= 0 and "top_ups"."provider_total_satang" > 0
